Travis CI configuration for building and testing JerryScript on Linux and macOS with various options.

# Purpose
This configuration file is for setting up a Travis CI build environment for a project written in C, targeting both Linux and macOS operating systems. It specifies the use of the `trusty` distribution for Linux and requires `sudo` access. The `env` section defines multiple build options and test configurations, including checks for code signing, static analysis, and unit tests. The `matrix` section includes additional configurations for macOS, ensuring that tests are run on both operating systems. The `before_install` section contains scripts to install necessary dependencies based on the operating system, and the `script` section specifies the command to execute the tests using Python. The `notifications` section is configured to send build status updates to an IRC channel, with the channel name encrypted to prevent spam.
